implementations.title: Exponential decay of var_inc
implementations.reason: Gradually reducing var_inc over time prevents activity scores from growing too large and improves long-term stability.

implementations.title: Perturbation on restart phases
implementations.reason: Adding a small random flip to saved phases after restart increases exploration and helps escape local optima.

implementations.title: Reset local_best on rephase
implementations.reason: Resetting local_best to current saved phases ensures the rephase starts from a fresh best phase, improving adaptability.

implementations.title: Additional LBD-based restart trigger
implementations.reason: Adding a second condition based on absolute LBD ratio helps restart more aggressively when recent clauses are poor quality.

implementations.title: Progress-based rephase trigger
implementations.reason: Adding a condition based on trail size relative to threshold triggers rephase when the solver is stuck, improving search diversity.
